class MainScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        # Segment 1: Introduction (9.7s)
        problem_text = Text("Find the 10th term of an AP", font_size=42).to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(problem_text), run_time=3.0)
        self.wait(6.7)
        
        # Segment 2: Identify known values (4.6s)
        known_values = VGroup(
            MathTex("a = 2", font_size=48),
            MathTex("d = 5", font_size=48),
            MathTex("n = 10", font_size=48)
        ).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.5).to_edge(LEFT, buff=1.0).shift(DOWN * 0.5)
        
        self.play(FadeIn(known_values, shift=RIGHT), run_time=2.5)
        self.wait(2.1)
        
        # Segment 3: Apply formula and solve (25.4s)
        formula = MathTex("a_n", "=", "a", "+", "(n-1)", "d", font_size=44).to_edge(UP).shift(DOWN * 0.5)
        self.play(
            FadeOut(problem_text),
            Write(formula),
            run_time=2.0
        )
        self.wait(1.0)
        
        # Create copies of values to animate
        a_copy = MathTex("2", font_size=44, color=YELLOW).move_to(known_values[0].get_center())
        d_copy = MathTex("5", font_size=44, color=YELLOW).move_to(known_values[2].get_center())
        n_copy = MathTex("10", font_size=44, color=YELLOW).move_to(known_values[1].get_center())
        
        # Animate values flying into formula
        self.add(a_copy, d_copy, n_copy)
        
        substituted_formula = MathTex("a_{10}", "=", "2", "+", "(10-1)", "\\times", "5", font_size=44).move_to(formula.get_center())
        
        self.play(
            a_copy.animate.move_to(substituted_formula[2].get_center()),
            n_copy.animate.move_to(substituted_formula[4].get_center()),
            d_copy.animate.move_to(substituted_formula[6].get_center()),
            Transform(formula, substituted_formula),
            run_time=2.5
        )
        self.remove(a_copy, d_copy, n_copy)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        # Highlight (10-1) and simplify to 9
        highlight_box1 = SurroundingRectangle(substituted_formula[4], color=BLUE, buff=0.1)
        self.play(Create(highlight_box1), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        nine = MathTex("9", font_size=44, color=GREEN).move_to(substituted_formula[4].get_center())
        self.play(
            FadeOut(highlight_box1),
            Transform(substituted_formula[4], nine),
            run_time=1.2
        )
        self.wait(0.8)
        
        # Update formula to show 9 × 5
        step2_formula = MathTex("a_{10}", "=", "2", "+", "9", "\\times", "5", font_size=44).move_to(formula.get_center())
        self.play(Transform(formula, step2_formula), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        # Highlight 9 × 5 and simplify to 45
        mult_group = VGroup(step2_formula[4], step2_formula[5], step2_formula[6])
        highlight_box2 = SurroundingRectangle(mult_group, color=BLUE, buff=0.1)
        self.play(Create(highlight_box2), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        fortyfive = MathTex("45", font_size=44, color=GREEN).move_to(mult_group.get_center())
        step3_formula = MathTex("a_{10}", "=", "2", "+", "45", font_size=44).move_to(formula.get_center())
        self.play(
            FadeOut(highlight_box2),
            Transform(formula, step3_formula),
            run_time=1.2
        )
        self.wait(0.8)
        
        # Highlight 2 + 45 and show final answer
        add_group = VGroup(step3_formula[2], step3_formula[3], step3_formula[4])
        highlight_box3 = SurroundingRectangle(add_group, color=BLUE, buff=0.1)
        self.play(Create(highlight_box3), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        final_answer = MathTex("a_{10}", "=", "47", font_size=44).move_to(formula.get_center())
        self.play(
            FadeOut(highlight_box3),
            Transform(formula, final_answer),
            run_time=1.0
        )
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        # Make 47 large and centered
        big_answer = MathTex("47", font_size=96, color=GOLD).move_to(ORIGIN)
        self.play(
            FadeOut(known_values),
            FadeOut(VGroup(final_answer[0], final_answer[1])),
            Transform(final_answer[2], big_answer),
            run_time=2.0
        )
        
        # Flash effect
        self.play(Flash(big_answer, color=YELLOW, flash_radius=1.5), run_time=1.0)
        self.wait(5.5)
        # Hard Sync: Injected wait to match audio (25.20s -> 25.38s)
        self.wait(0.180)

class MainScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        # Segment 1: Introduction (9.7s)
        problem_text = Text("Find the 10th term of an AP", font_size=40)
        self.play(Write(problem_text), run_time=3.0)
        self.wait(2.0)
        self.play(FadeOut(problem_text), run_time=1.0)
        self.wait(3.7)
        
        # Segment 2: Identify known values (4.6s)
        formula = MathTex(r"a_n = a + (n-1)d", font_size=48).to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(formula), run_time=2.0)
        
        known_values = VGroup(
            MathTex(r"a = 2", font_size=40),
            MathTex(r"d = 5", font_size=40),
            MathTex(r"n = 10", font_size=40)
        ).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.5).to_edge(LEFT).shift(DOWN*0.5)
        
        self.play(Write(known_values), run_time=2.0)
        self.wait(0.6)
        
        # Segment 3: Plug values and solve (25.4s)
        # Create the substituted formula
        substituted = MathTex(r"a_{10} = 2 + (10-1) \times 5", font_size=44).next_to(formula, DOWN, buff=1.0)
        
        # Animate values flying into formula
        a_copy = known_values[0].copy()
        n_copy = known_values[2].copy()
        d_copy = known_values[1].copy()
        
        self.play(
            a_copy.animate.move_to(substituted.get_part_by_tex("2").get_center()),
            n_copy.animate.move_to(substituted.get_part_by_tex("10").get_center()),
            d_copy.animate.move_to(substituted.get_part_by_tex("5").get_center()),
            run_time=2.5
        )
        self.remove(a_copy, n_copy, d_copy)
        self.play(Write(substituted), run_time=1.5)
        self.wait(1.0)
        
        # Highlight (10-1) and simplify to 9
        highlight_box1 = SurroundingRectangle(substituted.get_part_by_tex("(10-1)"), color=YELLOW, buff=0.1)
        self.play(Create(highlight_box1), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        step2 = MathTex(r"a_{10} = 2 + 9 \times 5", font_size=44).move_to(substituted.get_center())
        self.play(
            FadeOut(highlight_box1),
            Transform(substituted, step2),
            run_time=1.5
        )
        self.wait(1.0)
        
        # Highlight 9 × 5 and simplify to 45
        highlight_box2 = SurroundingRectangle(substituted.get_part_by_tex(r"9 \times 5"), color=YELLOW, buff=0.1)
        self.play(Create(highlight_box2), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        step3 = MathTex(r"a_{10} = 2 + 45", font_size=44).move_to(substituted.get_center())
        self.play(
            FadeOut(highlight_box2),
            Transform(substituted, step3),
            run_time=1.5
        )
        self.wait(1.0)
        
        # Highlight 2 + 45 and show final answer
        highlight_box3 = SurroundingRectangle(substituted.get_part_by_tex(r"2 + 45"), color=YELLOW, buff=0.1)
        self.play(Create(highlight_box3), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        # Clear everything and show final answer
        final_answer = MathTex(r"47", font_size=80, color=GREEN).move_to(ORIGIN)
        self.play(
            FadeOut(formula),
            FadeOut(known_values),
            FadeOut(highlight_box3),
            FadeOut(substituted),
            run_time=1.0
        )
        
        self.play(
            Write(final_answer),
            final_answer.animate.scale(1.2),
            run_time=2.0
        )
        self.play(Flash(final_answer, color=YELLOW, flash_radius=1.5), run_time=1.0)
        self.wait(8.0)
        # Hard Sync WARNING: Animation exceeds audio by 0.52s

class MainScene(Scene):

        )

        third_term.next_to(second_term, RIGHT, buff=2.0)
        
        self.play(

            Write(arrow2_label),
            run_time=2.0
        )
        self.play(Write(third_term), run_time=1.5)
        self.wait(1.0)
        
        # Create the fourth term 'a+3d'

            color=GOLD,

        )

        )

        self.wait(7.9)
        
        # Hard Sync: Injected wait to match audio (27.40s -> 28.43s)

        self.wait(1.0)
        
        # Show d = a₃ - a₂

        formula2.next_to(formula1, DOWN, buff=0.4)
        self.play(Write(formula2), run_time=2.0)
        self.wait(1.0)
        
        # Highlight both d's to show they're the same
        self.play(
            Indicate(formula1[0], color=YELLOW, scale_factor=1.3),

        )
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        # Show d = a₄ - a₃
        formula3 = MathTex("d", "=", "a_4", "-", "a_3", font_size=52, color=WHITE)
        formula3.next_to(formula2, DOWN, buff=0.4)
        self.play(Write(formula3), run_time=2.0)
        self.wait(0.5)
        
        # Final highlight showing all d's are the same
        self.play(
            Indicate(formula1[0], color=GOLD, scale_factor=1.4),
            Indicate(formula2[0], color=GOLD, scale_factor=1.4),
            Indicate(formula3[0], color=GOLD, scale_factor=1.4),
            run_time=2.0
        )
        
        # Create a box around all formulas to emphasize consistency
        consistency_box = SurroundingRectangle(
            VGroup(formula1, formula2, formula3),
            color=GOLD,
            buff=0.3
        )
        self.play(Create(consistency_box), run_time=1.0)
        self.wait(0.7)
